title: Device Home Screen - Release Notes button opens modal with Release Notes
scenario: Release Notes modal displays and dismisses correctly when tapping OK on Device Home screen with connected headset not on latest firmware
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and not on the latest firmware.
5. Observe the modal that appears displaying the release notes for the connected device.
6. Tap the "OK" button on the modal.
expected: The modal closes and the user is returned to the Device Home screen.
